results.title: Who Is Akriti Agarwal? Meet Prithvi Shaw’s Fiance Allegedly Accusing Delhi Capitals Star Of Cheating | Check Family And Net Worth
results.description: Discarded Indian cricketer Prithvi Shaw seemed to have embroiled herself in another controversy as his marriage with his fiance Akriti Agarwal now remains in limbo. The post Who Is Akriti Agarwal? Meet Prithvi Shaw’s Fiance Allegedly Accusing Delhi Capitals Star Of Cheating | Check Family And Net Worth appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

results.title: 50-Year-Old Worker Dies After Hand Caught In Paper Machine At Himachal Mill
results.description: Kirti Singh, 50, died after his hand was caught in a paper machine at Jassar Paper Mill in Himachal Pradesh; police investigate safety protocol adherence.

results.title: UP Mango Festival wraps up: Farmers’ income, exports in focus; 147 awards given away
results.description: Minister of state (independent charge) for horticulture, agricultural marketing, agricultural foreign trade, and agricultural export, Dinesh Pratap Singh, who was the chief guest, distributed prizes to winners of various competitions and said the festival aimed to enhance farmers’ income while securing global recognition for Uttar Pradesh’s mangoes.

results.title: Kerala row over Adani’s Vizhinjam port deal likely to fizzle out
results.description: Vizhinjam Port Row: Adani Group's 49% stake sale to Mediterranean Shipping Company faces little regulatory hurdle due to existing port ventures.

results.title: Bescom: Tenants will continue getting Gruha Jyothi benefits
results.description: Bescom assures tenants will retain Gruha Jyothi benefits amid ongoing verification; no extra paperwork required.

results.title: Gurugram: Residents’ body urges officials to take action against illegal encroachments in Sector-42
results.description: Gurugram, Jul 5 (PTI) A residents’ body in Gurugram has urged Haryana government authorities to launch immediate enforcement action against what it alleges is a large-scale illegal commercial cluster operating on government land in Sector 42, claiming that official surveys and restoration orders have remained unimplemented for over a year. The Global Foyer Condominium Association [...]

results.title: INS Sanshodhak joins Southern Naval Command in Kochi
results.description: INS Sanshodhak, the Indian Navy's fourth Survey Vessel Large, has arrived in Kochi, its new home port. Commissioned in Kolkata by Prime Minister Modi, this indigenously built ship boasts advanced hydrographic and oceanographic systems. Beyond its primary survey role, Sanshodhak can support disaster relief and function as a hospital ship, significantly boosting India's maritime capabilities and strategic reach.

results.title: 15 India-bound ships carrying urea, DAP and sulphur cross Hormuz: Govt
results.description: Despite Middle East conflict disruptions, India's fertilizer supply remains robust. Most shipments successfully navigated the Strait of Hormuz, while domestic production surpassed targets. Proactive planning, diplomatic outreach for new sources, and full restoration of natural gas to plants ensured uninterrupted availability, safeguarding farmers' interests against global price hikes. Ample stocks cover over 51% of annual demand.
